Definition.Description: Assembles basic components together to produce more complex items. Produces Medical and Radiaion Kits, Comms and Medical Components, Acid Power Cells, Motors, Thrust Catalysts, Solar Cells, Capacitors, and Cryocoolers. Uses Ruby Laser technology to run 3x faster. Power Usage: 3MW

Advanced assembling machinery, capable of producing more intricate and compact components. Produces Laser Emitters, Lithium Power Cells, Nucleators, Advanced Motors, Reactor Components, Superconducting Magnets, Tokamak Blanket Plates, and Vacuum Cells. Uses Ruby Laser technology to run 3x faster. Power Usage: 8MW
Melts materials together to make Glass, Ceramics, and runs hot enough to make Carbon Fiber Strands. Uses Topaz technology to run 3x faster. Power Usage: 7MW

Advanced production machinery for delicate electronic components. Produces Basic and Advanced Computers, Thermocouples, Sensor Clusters, Hacking Chips, and Displays. Uses Garnet Microlaser technology to run 3x faster. Power Usage: 4MW

Automated production of basic components. Produces Basic Computers, Construction Components, Metal Grids, Electromagnets, Heating Elements, Lightbulbs, Powerkits, and Alkaline Power Cells. Uses Ruby Laser technology to run 3x faster. Power Usage: 2MW
Presses materials into Plates. Uses Sapphire tech and a Titanium ram to run 3x faster Power Usage: 3MW
Produces Epoxy, PAN, Synthetic Polymer, processes Polymers into useful forms, and mixes Asphalt. Uses Topaz technology to run 3x faster. Power Usage: 10MW
Draws and insulates Wire of various types. Uses Ruby Laser technology and inductive cooling to run 3x faster Power Usage: 3MW
Forms Tubes and Girders using high-power direct lasers to melt metals and forcefully form them to shapes. Uses Ruby Laser technology to run 3x faster. Power Usage: 3MW

Mixes Gunpowder, and produces various types of Ammunition and Explosives. Can produce "Heavy" class munitions, and produces simple munitions 3x faster
Power Usage: 2MW
Uses NanoBot Technology to craft any component at high speeds. The most expensive machine in the game, requiring materials from almost every planet Power Usage: 30MW
Crushes Stone and Ores. Crushed Ore can be refined more efficiently. Uses Diamond crushing blades to run 3x faster than steel tech Power Usage: 5MW
Filters impurites from Crushed Ore to further increase refining yield. Uses Diamond-studded mills to run 3x faster than steel tech Power Usage: 10MW
The Heavy Refinery can smelt all ores, and at 3x speed. Extracts slightly more materials from ore Power Usage: 6MW
The Heavy Refinery can smelt all ores, and at 3x speed. Extracts slightly more materials from ore Power Usage: 6MW
Refines Lithium, Niter, Sulfur, Pollucite, Potash, and extracts pure Carbon from Coal. Uses Ion Refining technology to run 3x faster and extract slightly more material. Power Usage: 7MW
